If you received this, your SMTP configuration is working.

ai.baseUrlProtocolInvalid: AI Base URL only supports http or https
ai.baseUrlLocalBlocked: AI Base URL cannot point to localhost or local domains
ai.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required when AI assistant is enabled
ai.disabled: AI is not enabled or configured
ai.emptyCommand: AI did not generate a valid command. Try describing the task in more detail
ai.requestBadModel: Invalid request. Please check the model name
ai.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired
ai.permissionDenied: API Key permission is insufficient or the account is disabled
ai.endpointNotFound: API endpoint or model was not found. Check Base URL and model
ai.htmlResponse: AI service returned an HTML page instead of API JSON. For One API, Base URL usually needs to include /v1, for example https://your-domain/v1
ai.rateLimited: API rate limit exceeded or quota exhausted
ai.serviceUnavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later
ai.connectFailed: Cannot connect to AI service. Check network or Base URL settings
ai.timeout: AI service timed out ({timeout}ms). Please retry later or check network/Base URL settings
